_comment_top: Project-scoped override — install to <repo>/.claude/settings.json. Merges on top of ~/.claude/settings.json per the precedence: Managed > Local > Project > User. This file only contains what differs per-project: stricter permissions, project-specific deny rules, and the deploy-guard Agent gate.
_precedence_note: Deny rules in this file accumulate with user-scope deny rules — you cannot 'allow' something the user scope denied by listing it here. Conversely, denies here CAN narrow the user-scope allow list for this project only.

permissions._comment_permissions: Project-strict defaults: no bypass, require approval for network writes, block the deploy-guard agent from being auto-spawned by the main loop (must be invoked by name).

env._comment_env: Project-only env vars. Do not put secrets here — .claude/settings.json is commonly checked into git. Use .claude/settings.local.json (gitignored) for anything sensitive.

hooks._comment_hooks: Extra hooks layered on top of the user-scope ones. The user-scope validate-bash runs first; this one adds project-specific bash guards (forbid editing generated files, etc.).
